clubs.name: CSIT Club
clubs.description: The premier technical club of MITS Gwalior, focused on software development, competitive programming, and technology innovation. We organize hackathons, coding bootcamps, and workshops throughout the year.

achievements.title: Smart India Hackathon – Regional Winners
achievements.description: Won SIH regional round 2023 with IoT Agriculture project

achievements.title: 500+ Students Trained
achievements.description: Conducted 20+ workshops on Web Dev, ML, Cloud & DevOps

achievements.title: Google Solution Challenge – Top 100
achievements.description: Global Top 100 in GDSC Solution Challenge 2024

achievements.title: ICPC Regionals Qualifier
achievements.description: 3 teams qualified for ICPC Asia-West Regional

customSections.title: Our Mission
customSections.content: To bridge the gap between classroom learning and industry-ready skills through hands-on experience.

customSections.title: What We Offer
customSections.content: Weekly coding sessions, monthly hackathons, industry mentorship, competitive programming training, and placement prep.

customSections.title: Tech Stack
customSections.content: React, Node.js, Python, TensorFlow, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Flutter, PostgreSQL, MongoDB & more.

clubs.name: Robotics Club
clubs.description: Focused on robotics, IoT and embedded systems. We build real-world automation solutions and participate in national-level competitions.

achievements.title: SIH Hardware – Winners
achievements.description: Smart irrigation system won SIH Hardware round

customSections.title: Lab & Equipment
customSections.content: 3D printers, CNC machines, Arduino/RPi kits, drone stations, and soldering workstations.

customSections.title: Active Projects
customSections.content: Autonomous delivery bot, Smart greenhouse, Line-following swarm robots, Gesture-controlled robotic arm.

clubs.name: Cultural Club
clubs.description: Celebrating the cultural diversity of MITS through music, dance, drama and literary events. We are the heartbeat of campus life.

achievements.title: Inter-College Dance Championship
achievements.description: 1st place at Techno-Cultural Fest, IIIT Bhopal

achievements.title: National Drama Competition
achievements.description: Represented MP state in National Youth Festival

customSections.title: Wings
customSections.content: Dance, Music, Drama & Theatre, Literary, Art & Design, Photography.

customSections.title: Flagship Events
customSections.content: Rangmanch, Open Mic Nights, Cultural Weekends, Flash Mobs, Heritage Walks.

clubs.name: Sports Committee
clubs.description: Organizing intra and inter-college sports events, tournaments and fitness programs. From cricket to athletics, we foster healthy competition.

achievements.title: State Athletics – 3 Gold Medals
achievements.description: Gold in 100m, Long Jump, Shot Put

customSections.title: Facilities
customSections.content: Cricket ground, Football field, Basketball & Volleyball courts, Badminton, Table Tennis, Gymnasium, 400m track.

customSections.title: Upcoming
customSections.content: Inter-branch Football League, Badminton Open, Table Tennis Championship, Annual Marathon.

events.title: CodeQuest 2024
events.description: National level coding competition with 200+ participants from across India.

events.title: RoboWars v5
events.description: Battle of the bots – design, build and fight!

events.title: HackMITS 2024
events.description: 36-hour hackathon with prizes worth ₹50,000!

events.title: Web Dev Bootcamp
events.description: Intensive 2-day full-stack bootcamp with React & Node.js.

events.title: RoboWars 2024
events.description: Build your bot and compete! Teams of 2-4.

events.title: Rangmanch – Annual Cultural Fest
events.description: 3 days of dance, music, drama & literary competitions!

events.title: Inter-College Cricket Tournament
events.description: T20 cricket – Gwalior region colleges. Winner gets MITS Trophy!

events.title: AI/ML Workshop
events.description: Hands-on ML with Python, scikit-learn & TensorFlow.

events.title: Cybersecurity Awareness Workshop
events.description: Ethical hacking, penetration testing & CTF challenges!

events.title: IoT Bootcamp – Smart Campus
events.description: Build IoT solutions with Arduino, ESP32 & RPi.

events.title: Poetry Slam – Open Mic Night
events.description: Poetry, spoken word, and storytelling. Refreshments included!

events.title: Yoga & Fitness Camp
events.description: Week-long morning yoga & fitness led by certified trainers.

events.title: Open Source Contribution Day
events.description: Learn Git, GitHub & make your first PR!

events.title: Photography Walk – Heritage Gwalior
events.description: Capture Gwalior Fort & Jai Vilas Palace. Best photos exhibited!

events.title: HackMITS 2026 – National Hackathon
events.description: 36-hour national hackathon with ₹2,00,000 prize pool. Build solutions for real-world problems.

events.title: RoboWars 2026 – Combat Robotics
events.description: Pit your robot against others in MITS's premier combat robotics tournament.

events.title: Rangmanch 2026 – Annual Cultural Fest
events.description: MITS's biggest cultural extravaganza — music, dance, drama, art and fashion.

events.title: Deep Learning Bootcamp
events.description: 5-day intensive bootcamp on Neural Networks, CNNs, Transformers and LLMs.

events.title: MITS Premier Cricket League 2026
events.description: Inter-branch cricket league. 8 teams, 3 weeks of action.

events.title: IoT Smart City Hackathon
events.description: Build IoT solutions for smart cities. Sponsored by ISRO & DRDO.

events.title: Open Mic Night – Poetry & Music
events.description: An evening of raw talent — spoken word, indie music, stand-up.

events.title: Cybersecurity CTF 2026
events.description: Capture The Flag competition. Prove your hacking skills ethically.

messages.content: Hey everyone! Is the HackMITS registration open?
Yes Aryan! Just registered. The dashboard UI looks amazing.
Good to see the enthusiasm. Please ensure all technical requirements are met.
Aryan, did you get your RoboWars interview slot?
